title: Post-doctoral Research Fellow
subtitle: Department of Information Engineering, University of Padova · Supervisor: Prof. Andrea Facchinetti
description: Research fellowship on clinical decision support systems for pediatric T1D management. Developing digital twin methodologies with ReplayBG and LLM-based data interpretation tools.

title: Ph.D. in Information Engineering
subtitle: University of Padova · Advisor: Prof. Andrea Facchinetti
description: Thesis: "Algorithms and Digital Health Solutions for Wearable Sensor Data Acquisition, Processing and Interpretation in Chronic Diseases". Defended March 2025. Visiting periods at Inselspital Bern, University of Cagliari, and Universitat Politècnica de València.

title: Master's Degree in Bioengineering — 102/110
subtitle: University of Padova
description: Thesis on development of a mobile platform prototype for T1D clinical trials. Advisors: Prof. Giovanni Sparacino & Prof. Andrea Facchinetti.

title: Bachelor's Degree in Information Engineering
subtitle: University of Padova
description: Thesis on mathematical modeling of pancreatic alpha-cells and glucagon secretion. Advisor: Prof. Morten Gram Pedersen.
